strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_GODSLING_UNL: Ut Driver, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon aut altiori, sine accipiendo armis aut telis.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_MONSOONUNLOC: Ut Driver, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PISTOLPASSIV: Ut Driver, perfice eventum teleportationis, sine accipiendo armis.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SUIT_UNLOCKA: Ut Driver, inflige letalem ictum duci per sclopetum sagittarium.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SUPPLY_DROP_: Ut Driver, perfice eventum teleportationis, non sinens ullum thecam copiarum evanescere.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_TYPHOON_UNLO: Ut Driver, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon, aut vince Eclipse 8.\n<color=#8888>(Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_DRIVER_BODY_UNLOCKABLE_A: Attinge gradum 3 in minus quam 15 minutis.
strings.PRIMARY_MACHINEGUN_DESCRIPTION: Velociter puga pro 120% vulneris per ictum.
strings.PRIMARY_NEMMANDO_SWORD_DESCRIPTION: Seca hostes ante per gladium pro 160% vulneris.
strings.PRIMARY_PISTOL_DESCRIPTION: Prototypum vitiosum quod solum paucos ictus emittere potest.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_ARMCANNON_DESC: Arm Cannon, ex chalybeis mekorilis compositum.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_ARSENAL_TOKEN: <style=cKeywordName>Arsenal</style><style=cSub>Muta inter armis per primariis et secundariis peritiis tuis.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BEETLESHIELD_DESC: Scutum additivum ad defensionem dum sclopum utentem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_LORE:
Dorso ad murum et contra difficultates
Cum voluntate et facto
Tuae res gestae dicuntur mirabiles
Tu es simpliciter complexus

Contra fluctum postulationum dystopicarum
Non illae cogitationes quae actiones tuas movent
Sed tu ostensus es


Vere homo et vere heros

"Quid ergo facis?"

"Ego vehiculum guberno."
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et postea evanuit, numquam vere homo factus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et postea abiit, omnia sicut cum coepit.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Hostes habent forsitan iacere novum arma. Ea praebent potentes impetus pro limitato tempore!
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PASSIVE2_DESCRIPTION: Tuus fidelis sclopus est omne quod opus est.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PASSIVE3_DESCRIPTION: Hostes habent forsitan iacere tela. Ea praebent tuae armis potentes impetus pro limitato tempore!
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_BAZOOKA_DESCRIPT: Onusta et puga rocketam pro 600%-1200% vulneris.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_BEETLESHIELD_DES: Puga sclopum pro 250% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_FALSE_PISTOL_DES: Puga sclopum pro 350% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.\nNulla minutio vulneris per distantiam.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_GOLDENGUN_DESCRI: Puga sclopum pro 1500% vulneris. Semper criticus. Loricam ignorat.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_LUNAR_PISTOL_DES: Puga sclopum pro 350% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_MACHINEGUN_DESCR: Puga celerm seriem ictuum pro 120% vulneris per ictum.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_NEMMANDO_DESCRIP: Puga sclopum pro 240% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_NEMMERC_DESCRIPT: Puga explosionem brevem pro 6x150% vulneris, et rursus post dimittere.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_PISTOL_DESCRIPTI: Puga sclopum pro 220% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_PYRITE_PISTOL_DE: Puga sclopum pro 250% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_RAV_SLASHCOMBO_D: Ictus ante pro 280% vulneris. Quisque tertius ictus stupefacit et infligit 560% vulneris.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_REVOLVER_DESCRIP: Puga sclopum pro 500% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_SLUG_SHOTGUN_DES: Puga globum ex brevi distantia pro 900% vulneris.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_SMG_DESCRIPTION: Puga celerem seriem ictuum pro 150% vulneris.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_PRIMARY_VOID_PISTOL_DESC: Puga sclopum pro 350% vulneris. Ictus critici bis fungeruntur.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_BANDITREVOLVER: Intende et puga vastum ictum pro 1500% vulneris. Restituit frigorationem et tela post caedem, sed consumit arma.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_BASH_DESCRIPTI: Stuporifice. Stupefac et pelle proximos hostes, infligens 250% vulneris illis.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_BEETLESHIELD_D: Intende et puga usque ad 500% vulneris. Augat celeritatem sclopi, praecisionem et loricam.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_FALSE_PISTOL_D: Intende et puga usque ad 900% vulneris. Penetranx. Augat celeritatem sclopi et praecisionem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_GOLDENGUN_DESC: Intende et puga vastum ictum pro 1500% vulneris. Consumit arma dum usus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_HEAVY_MACHINEG: Iacta grenadam quae stupefacit hostes, infligens 800% vulneris.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_LUNAR_PISTOL_D: Intende et puga usque ad 700% vulneris. Augat celeritatem sclopi et praecisionem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_LUNARHAMMER_DE: Agilis. Salvis fragmentorum lunarium, infligens 180% vulneris cuique.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_MANDO_SMG_DESC: Stuporificus. Repetita pugna, infligens 6x250% vulneris. Numerus ictuum crescit cum celeritate impetus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_NEMMANDO_DESCR: Stuporifice. Puga pluries, infligens 6x250% vulneris per ictum. Numerus ictuum crescit cum celeritate impetus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_PISTOL_DESCRIP: Intende et puga usque ad 500% vulneris. Augat celeritatem sclopi et praecisionem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_PLASMACANNON_D: Puga turbinem explosionum plasmatis, infligens 1000% vulneris cuique.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_PYRITE_PISTOL_: Intende et puga usque ad 500% vulneris. Augat celeritatem sclopi et praecisionem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_RAV_PUNCH_DESC: Iacta te ante et pulsa, infligens 400% vulneris cum unda impulsa, infligens idem vulnus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_ROCKETLAUNCHER: Puga celerem salven rocketarum, infligens 250% vulneris cuique.
Celeris salvens rocketarum, infligens 300% vulneris cuique.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_SNIPER_DESCRIP: Intende per visorium, detegens debilitates et puga vastum ictum, infligens 600% vulneris.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SECONDARY_VOID_PISTOL_DE: Intende et puga usque ad 700% vulneris. Augat celeritatem sclopi et praecisionem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_DRIVERCOIN_DESCR: Iacta nummum, qui pugi potest ad augendum vulnus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_GRENADE_DESCRIPT: Iacta grenadam quae stupefacit hostes, infligens 500% vulneris. Hostes stupefacti intendunt in casu directionibus pro 10 secundis.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_GRENADE_SCEPTER_: Iacta grenadam quae stupefacit hostes, infligens 500% vulneris. Hostes stupefacti intendunt in casu directionibus pro 10 secundis.\nSCEPTRO: Iacta Molotovianum quod flammabit.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_HEAL_DESCRIPTION: Educat Medkit et gradatim sana te usque ad maximam valetudinem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_KNIFE_DESCRIPTIO: Seca proximos hostes cum serrata lamina, infligens 470% vulneris et vulnerans eos, minuens loricam pro 4 secundis.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_KNIFE_SCEPTER_DE: Seca proximos hostes cum serrata lamina, infligens 470% vulneris et vulnerans eos, minuens loricam pro 4 secundis.\nSCEPTRO: Dimidium frigorationis et additus onus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SUPPLY_DROP_DESC: Voca archam quae continet casu arma. Arma venit solum cum dimidio telorum.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SUPPLY_DROP_LEGA: Voca archam quae continet Prototypum Rocketae. Vocare potes solum unum per speciem.
Vocatio archae quae continet Prototypum Rocketae.\nSCEPTRO: Vocatio armorum vacui.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SUPPLY_DROP_SCEP: Voca archam quae continet casu arma. Arma venit solum cum dimidio telorum.\nSCEPTRO: Vocatio armorum vacui.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SYRINGE_DESCRIPT: Da tibi injectionem <style=cIsUtility>syringae</style>, praebens additae <style=cIsDamage>celeritatis impugnationis</style>, <style=cIsUtility>celeritatis motus</style> et <style=cIsHealing>restaurationis valetudinis</style> pro proximis <style=cIsUtility>6 secundis</style>.</style>0__
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SYRINGE_SCEPTER_: Da tibi injectionem <style=cIsUtility>syringae</style>, praebens additae <style=cIsDamage>celeritatis impugnationis</style> et <style=cIsHealing>restaurationis valetudinis</style> pro proximis <style=cIsUtility>6 secundis</style>.\n<style=cIsUtility>SCEPTRO: Augat fortunas vulneris et ictus critici et firmat buffos.</style></style>0__
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SYRINGELEGACY_DE: Da tibi injectionem syringae, praebens casu actionem impugnativam per proximos 6 secundas.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_SPECIAL_SYRINGELEGACY_SC: Da tibi injectionem syringae, praebens casu actionem impugnativam per proximos 6 secundas.\nSCEPTRO: Applicat omnes tres buffos statim.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_UTILITY_DASH_DESCRIPTION: Cursor brevem distantiam. Potes habere usque ad 2 onera.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_BODY_UTILITY_SLIDE_DESCRIPTIO: Labere super terrain brevem distantiam. Potes pugnare durant labationem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_GOLDENGUN_DESC: Infligit enorme vulnus, sed habet solum paucos ictus.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_GRENADELAUNCHER_DESC: Veloces grenadae cum magno vulnere, sed parvo explosionis radio.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_HEAVY_MACHINEGUN_DESC: Salves telorum acu et altae praecisionis.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_MACHINEGUN_DESC: Velociter pugnat, sed habet altum disseminationem.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_NEEDLER_DESC: Prototypum vitiosum quod solum paucos ictus emittere potest.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_PASSIVE_TOKEN: <style=cKeywordName>Focus</style><style=cSub>Focus valde augat productionem vulneris tui, sed cave ne circumveniaris dum intendis.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_PLASMACANNON_DESC: Utere incomparabili potestate in manu tua.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_PYRITEGUN_DESC: Arma perfecta sine defectibus. Velocitas est bellum.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_RIOT_SHOTGUN_DESC: Penetratio est optima ad multitudinis regimen.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_ROCKETLAUNCHER_ALT_DESC: Prototypum vitiosum quod solum paucos ictus emittere potest.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_SHOTGUN_DESC: Potentia brevis actionis cum vasto vulnere.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_SNIPER_DESC: Potentes singuli ictus cum forti reculu.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_VOID_PISTOL_DESC: Arma corrupta et firmata a vacuo.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_ARTI_GAUNTLET_DESC: Emitit pilas igneas cum significo vulnere quae incendunt.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_BANDITREVOLVER_DESC: Revolverum, quod per inferos et reditum transivit.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_RAV_SWORD_DESC: Salta et pavinge tuam viam per hostes.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_REVOLVER_DESC: Ictus cum magno vulnere cum letali finituro.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_SCAV_GUN_DESC: Arma improvisa quae pugnat fulgurationibus crudae energiae.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_SMG_DESC: Arma propinqua cum alto vulnere et magno disseminatione.
strings.ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_VOID_RIFLE_DESC: Adnihilandum omne quod in visum venit.
strings.SECONDARY_ARTI_GAUNTLET_DESCRIPTION: Puga crepitem magiae glaciei pro 600%-2000% vulneris.
strings.SECONDARY_BASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stuporificus</style>. Stupefac et pelle proximos hostes pro 250% vulneris.
strings.SECONDARY_HEAVY_MACHINEGUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stuporificus</style>. Iacta grenadam quae stupefacit hostes pro 800% vulneris.
strings.SECONDARY_LUNARHAMMER_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Puga salven fragmentorum lunarium, infligens 180% vulneris cuique.
strings.SECONDARY_PLASMACANNON_DESCRIPTION: Puga ictum plasmatis onustum pro 1000% vulneris.
strings.SECONDARY_ROCKETLAUNCHER_ALT_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stuporificus</style>. Puga celerm crepidinem rocketarum pro 250% vulneris cuique.
strings.UNLOCKABLE_ROB_DRIVER_WEAPON_DESC: Haec arma iam possunt eligi quandocumque in arsenale Driver.
strings.UTILITY_DASH_DESCRIPTION: Cursor brevem distantiam. Tenere potes usque ad 2 onera.
